docs.text: RESTify Experiment Replication Package All you need to replicate our findings, in one place. About As part of our submission to the ESEM 2023 conference , we offer a replication package that allows fast and independent replication of all our results and interpretations. This page serves as starting point for the various components needed. Note: This is the anonymized version of the replication package, created specifically for the reviewers. In case of an accept we will provide a link to the original replication package. We stress that the anonymization process affects the replicability, e.g. when java packages were renamed or parts of links were anonymized. Wherever the case, we add a marker "[A]" to indicate potential issues associated to the anonymization process. Package Content This section hot-links package content by scope: Content for the Experiment Setup: Recruitment Material MiniMax Heuristic Implementation for Balanced Groups Task Instruction Material Sample Task Applications Data Collected and Analyzed: Raw Experiment Collected Data Submission Correctness Evaluation Tool Extracted Times and Video Observations Statistical Analysis of Findings: Interactive Jupyter Notebook for Analysis Replication

docs.text: As part of our submission to the ESEM 2023 conference , we offer a replication package that allows fast and independent replication of all our results and interpretations. This page serves as starting point for the various components needed. Note: This is the anonymized version of the replication package, created specifically for the reviewers. In case of an accept we will provide a link to the original replication package. We stress that the anonymization process affects the replicability, e.g. when java packages were renamed or parts of links were anonymized. Wherever the case, we add a marker "[A]" to indicate potential issues associated to the anonymization process.
